title: Testing + CI integration for React dashboard
description: Add React testing and CI pipeline to existing workflow. Rescoped from original (TKT-213/214 DEFERRED): covers existing scaffold components only. Node.js 20, npm ci, ESLint, TypeScript check, Vitest. Path-filtered to scripts/the_lab/react-app/**.

florentino_gate.reason: CI pipeline for React app ensures quality gate on frontend code. Supports automation coverage target (82% → 90%).

build.notes: Added react-tests job to .github/workflows/ci.yml. Steps: checkout, Node.js 20 setup with npm cache, npm ci, npm run lint (ESLint), npx tsc --noEmit (type check), npm run test (Vitest). Path-filtered via git diff — skips when no react-app changes. Runs parallel to Python lint-and-test job.

domain_sanity.notes: Jose Mourinho: YES — CI integration is standard practice. Andy Flower: YES — no cricket domain impact. Pep Guardiola: YES — parallel job design is efficient, path filtering prevents unnecessary runs.

enforcement.notes: Tom Brady: Rescoped from original (blocked by TKT-213/214) to cover existing scaffold. Scope respected. No blocked_by dependencies remain.

system_check.notes: N'Golo Kante: ci.yml updated cleanly. New job runs independently of Python tests. Graceful skip when no react changes detected. No regressions in existing workflow.

post_task_note.what_changed: React testing CI pipeline added to existing ci.yml workflow. Path-filtered react-tests job with Node.js 20, lint, type check, and Vitest. Moves automation coverage toward 90% target.
post_task_note.assumption_tested: Path filtering via git diff is sufficient for conditional job execution in GitHub Actions — confirmed as standard practice.
post_task_note.risk_introduced: npm ci will fail if package-lock.json is missing or stale. Node.js not on local system — CI validation requires push to GitHub.
post_task_note.usp: Frontend code now has the same CI discipline as Python backend — lint, type check, test on every PR touching React files.

rescope_note: Original scope required TKT-213/214 (team pages and research desk migration). Both DEFERRED to Sprint 6. Rescoped to test existing scaffold from TKT-210 (Layout, HomePage, ComparisonPage, WinProbPage, utils). Full component testing expands when migrations land in Sprint 6.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Added react-tests job to ci.yml as parallel job. Path filtering, Node.js 20, npm cache, 4-step pipeline (install, lint, typecheck, test). Skip notification when no changes.

2026-02-28T01:00:00Z.detail: Rescope approved — original blockers (TKT-213/214) DEFERRED. Covers existing scaffold. All gates passed. Board updated.
